focus: Architectural baseline: GitNexus modules, ingestion phase DAG, MCP query/context/impact surfaces, resource templates, and portable-looking patterns for Public Code Graph, Memory causal graph, and Skill Graph framing.

graphEvents.label: Public Code Graph SQLite plus structural indexer

label: GitNexus phase dependency contracts look portable to Public Code Graph indexing orchestration; evidence: explicit phase deps, topological execution, declared-dependency filtering, typed phase outputs, and timed results.
